diff --git a/cli_tool/commands/commit/core/generator.py b/cli_tool/commands/commit/core/generator.py
index 1234567..abcdefg 100644
--- a/cli_tool/commands/commit/core/generator.py
+++ b/cli_tool/commands/commit/core/generator.py
@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ from cli_tool.core.agents.base_agent import BaseAgent
 
 class CommitMessageGenerator:
   """Generate conventional commit messages using AI."""
+  
   def __init__(self, model_id=None):
     self.agent = BaseAgent(model_id=model_id)
@@ -15,7 +16,10 @@ class CommitMessageGenerator:
     prompt = self._build_prompt(diff, ticket)
-    return self.agent.query(prompt)
+    response = self.agent.query(prompt)
+    if not response:
+      raise ValueError("AI agent returned empty response")
+    return response

diff --git a/tests/test_commands/test_commit/test_commit_generation.py b/tests/test_commands/test_commit/test_commit_generation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1234567
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/test_commands/test_commit/test_commit_generation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+"""Tests for commit message generation."""
+
+import pytest
+from cli_tool.commands.commit.core.generator import CommitMessageGenerator
+
+
+@pytest.mark.unit
+def test_generate_commit_message_with_empty_diff(mock_bedrock_client):
+  """Test that empty diff raises ValueError."""
+  generator = CommitMessageGenerator()
+  with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="empty diff"):
+    generator.generate_commit_message("")
